create.prompt: Primary request: A visually striking 8-second social media clip: a field of glowing neon cubes pulses in perfect rhythm, then one cube transforms into a bright circuit-like core, camera pushes in dramatically, ultra-clean motion, high contrast, cinematic lighting, no people, no text, no logos.
